source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Model a nitrogen molecule as a pair of small balls, each with the mass of a nitrogen atom, $2.3 \times 10^{-26}\,\text{kg}$, attached by a rigid massless rod with length $d = 2r = 188\,\text{pm}$. What is the moment of inertia of this molecule with respect to an axis passing through the midpoint and perpendicular to the molecular axis?

What is the moment of inertia of this molecule with respect to an axis passing through the midpoint and perpendicular to the molecular axis?
